There are four recent high-quality systematic reviews with meta-analyses of RCTs on the effects of exercise on blood pressure. Zhang and colleagues 42 included 9 studies including 14 d

tree.heading: Blood lipids

tree.heading: Glycaemic control
tree.content_preview: There are currently no published systematic reviews which have examined the effects of exercise or physical activity interventions on fasting blood sugar levels or HbA1C in non-dialysis CKD patients.
